creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Sat Sep  8 10:53:06 2012
New Revision: 303891
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303891

Log:
  fcitx-table-extra provides Boshiamy, Zhengma, Cangjie, and Quick input
  methods driven by the fcitx-table IM engine.
  
  WWW: http://code.google.com/p/fcitx/
  
  PR:		171365
  Submitted by:	Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/
  head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/chinese/Makefile

Modified: head/chinese/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/chinese/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 10:32:37 2012	(r303890)
+++ head/chinese/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 10:53:06 2012	(r303891)
@@ -44,6 +44,7 @@
     SUBDIR += fcitx-googlepinyin
     SUBDIR += fcitx-libpinyin
     SUBDIR += fcitx-sunpinyin
+    SUBDIR += fcitx-table-extra
     SUBDIR += fcitx-ui-light
     SUBDIR += fireflyttf
     SUBDIR += font-std

Added: head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/Makefile	Sat Sep  8 10:53:06 2012	(r303891)
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	fcitx-table-extra
+# Date created:				5 Sep 2012
+# Whom:			Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	fcitx-table-extra
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.2
+CATEGORIES=	chinese
+MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
+DIST_SUBDIR=	fcitx
+
+MAINTAINER=	lichray@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Table-based input methods for Fcitx
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	fcitx-config.4:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/fcitx
+
+USE_XZ=		yes
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+USE_CMAKE=	yes
+USE_GNOME=	intltool
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+STRIP=
+
+PROJECTHOST=	fcitx
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/distinfo	Sat Sep  8 10:53:06 2012	(r303891)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (fcitx/fcitx-table-extra-0.3.2.tar.xz) = fb118f365818ddaa8d29fdfea5492805dad51ee3d8e87fe45016a760e5ee1c7a
+SIZE (fcitx/fcitx-table-extra-0.3.2.tar.xz) = 3354240

Added: head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/chinese/fcitx-table-extra/pkg-descr	Sat Sep  8 10:53:06 2012	(r303891)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+fcitx-table-extra provides Boshiamy, Zhengma, Cangjie, and Quick input
+methods driven by the fcitx-table IM engine.
+
+WWW: http://code.google.com/p/fcitx/
